name: Ham and Cheese Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup sliced green onions, with tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F.
2. In a small bowl, toss together the shredded Monterey Jack cheese, onions and dill seed; set aside.
3. In a non-stick saucepan, melt margarine over medium heat. Stir in flour, then gradually stir in milk until thickened.
4. Remove from heat and fold in yogurt.
5. In a shallow baking dish, layer 1/3 of potatoes, 1/2 cheese mixture, 1/2 diced ham, and 1/2 yogurt mixture.
6. Repeat the layers, finishing with the remaining potatoes on top.
7. Sprinkle Swiss cheese over the casserole.
8. Bake for 30-35 minutes.
(278 calories per serving) 1 serving=1 Bread exchange 3 Lean Meat exchange 1 Fat exchange
